title: Recipe tags model write
summary: 36a 계약을 기반으로 tags/recipe_tags canonical model, P0 seed, tag normalization, manual/YouTube write path, recipes.tags projection writer를 구현한다.
goal: 서버가 레시피 태그를 canonical relation으로 저장하고 카드/legacy projection을 원자적으로 맞춰 36c 검색/테마와 36e 검수 UI가 신뢰할 tag 기반을 제공한다.

owners.claude: stage1/stage3 normally; local CLI started README draft but hung before full closeout
owners.codex: stage1 fallback completion, stage2 implementation, self-review per user instruction

notes: Stage 2 backend implementation completed on feature/be-36b-recipe-tags-model-write. Implements tags/recipe_tags additive migration, P0 semantic/source seed 36개, tag normalization, atomic recipes.tags projection writer, manual/YouTube write paths, YouTube semantic draft tag generation, and read-only tag suggestions endpoint. Local verification passed: targeted 36b Vitest set, existing manual/YouTube/Supabase/tag regressions, pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, and pnpm verify:backend with dummy public Supabase env plus alternate Playwright port. Search/themes/backfill/frontend remain split into 36c/36d/36e.
